text.title: Embedding Model Selection for RAG Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team upgrades from text-embedding-3-small to -large; queries return wrong chunks; relevance collapses.
antipattern.root-cause: Model swap silently mixes two vector spaces — old vectors stay at 1536 dims, new queries at 3072.
antipattern.fix: Lock model in decision-record; treat swap as full re-ingestion event with index versioning.

antipattern.symptom: Vector DB cost 4x expected; latency at p99 doubles.
antipattern.root-cause: Author left text-embedding-3-large at default 3072 dims for a 10M-chunk corpus.
antipattern.fix: Use 1024 dims for -large, 512 for -small; record choice in metadata.

antipattern.symptom: Recall@10 drops 40% on Ukrainian/English mixed query set.
antipattern.root-cause: Picked text-embedding-3-small (English-biased) for a multilingual corpus.
antipattern.fix: Switch to embed-multilingual-v3.0 or bge-m3; re-ingest.
